title: EnhancedVanillaFps
description:
Hello, I share my Modpack to Modrinth because i love play with him.
It gets like 400+ fps on my Laptop.
It works stable and i don't have bugs or some like that.
body:
EnhancedVanillaFps this is Modpack which optimise Minecraft in your PC/Laptop.

EnhancedVanillaFps is a Modpack which create to get the most Fps in Minecraft and remove lags, using best optimised mods.

Performance:

The mods in this pack optimise memory usage, cached game data for the fast game loading, increase Fps by the improve performance of the game code, cached chunk data for the faster chunk download, optimise entities, optimise networking packets.

Vanilla didnt't go anywhere:

Although the modpack uses large size of the mods but with the Vanilla-side of Minecraft everything good.
You can play on your server without lags. You can download your mods, because modpack does not conflict with any mods.

If you have problems or some issues:

Discord: stonks™#0844

I hope this Modpack give boost to your Fps in Minecraft.
Enjoy play minecraft with big Fps:)

(Mod-list you can see in the versions)
